_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and conduct analysis of target communications to identify information essential to support operations.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, data drift, and conditions requiring model retraining or replacement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.401), RC-A-003 (RC, cosine: 0.400).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.8/10 (raw 0.281). Shared vocabulary: [conduct]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, communications, essential, identify, information, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [conditions, data, degradation, deployment, drift, identifying] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.892, R=0.867). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Identify and conduct analysis of target communications to identify information e" and "Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, d". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.417 > STS 0.281 (gap +0.136). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [conduct] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [conduct]. DCWF-only: [analysis, communications, essential, identify, information, operations]. WIDAI-only: [conditions, data, degradation, deployment, drift, identifying].
